properties.name: Sugarloaf Mountain
properties.note: San Mateo calls the surrounding park Sugarloaf Mountain
"Discovery Peak" is the unofficial name

properties.name: Ralph's Mountain
properties.notes: Not in GNIS, maybe shouldn't be here. Source: http://www.openspace.org/plans_projects/downloads/SA_MasterPlan.pdf

properties.description: this place doesn't exists why is it on every map
properties.name: Echo Point

properties.inscription: LEN TURNER / 1922 – 1976 / MEMORIAL VISTA POINT / PROJECT SUPERINTENDANT WHO DIRECTED THE CONSTRUCTION OF UPPER RALSTON AVENUE AND MOVED THE EARTH FOR MUCH OF THE DEVELOPMENT SEEN UPON THE SURROUNDING HILLSIDES.
properties.name: Len Turner Memorial Vista Point

properties.description: High Medow Vista Point at the intersection of several trails, overlooking the South Bay with views ranging from Mountain View to San Jose including the bay itself.

properties.name: Loma Prieta

properties.description: A spot with a breathtaking view over San Francisco Bay, and of the hills behind.
View of Watsonville, Moss Landing, and Monterey Bay; Road turnout available
Very good views of Blossom Valley right here. You can park on Skyway Drive and walk into here.
A view over the forests to the west.
properties.name: Site of the Cross

properties.description: Hill where you can look over large area of South Bay. Bring a lawn chair for July 4th and watch fireworks.
